expectations.text: Notes that dashboard analytics bucket by updatedAt (not completedAt) when seeding

expectations.text: Prescribes busting the service worker / clearing gsd-* caches before trusting a browser render

expectations.text: Treats console errors as a verification dimension (checked, or explicitly deferred with reason)
